title: Pod Environment Variables
description: Pod Environment Variables documents overview material for Pod Environment Variables in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the configuration class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights spec. containers. env, spec. containers. envFrom, Pod fields to env, and Container fields to env, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include kubernetes, pod, deployment, environment, and env, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / kubernetes / env / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
